content.cn_text: [旁白]: 现在请仔细听并回答问题一到五。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Now listen carefully and answer questions one to five.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 你好，克拉伦斯之家。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Hello, Clarence House.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 哦，你好。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Oh hello.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我明年要结婚，我听说你们酒店有举办婚礼的执照。
content.en_text: I'm getting married next year and I understand your license to hold weddings at the hotel

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 是的，我们有。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Yes, we are.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 请问您考虑的是哪个日期？
content.en_text: Can I ask what date you were thinking of?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 6月1日或7日。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Either the 1st or the 7th of June.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 好的，让我看看。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Right, let me see.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 哦，恐怕7号已经有预订了，但我们6月还有空房。
content.en_text: Oh, I'm afraid we already have a booking for the 7th, but we still have availability on June

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 1号。
content.en_text: the 1st.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那太好了。[酒店员工]: 那么，您打算邀请多少位客人？[黛比]: 大约80位。[酒店员工]: 考虑到这个人数，我们推荐牛津套房。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: That would be fine. [Hotel Staff]: So, how many guests are you going to be inviting? [Debbie]: About 80. [Hotel Staff]: So for that number, we'd recommend the Oxford suite.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 不知道您是否来过这家酒店。
content.en_text: I don't know if you've been to the hotel.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Yes.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 事实上，几年前我曾去那里参加过一场婚礼，印象非常深刻。
content.en_text: In fact, I went to a wedding there a few years ago and I was really impressed.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 很好。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Very good.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那我想我们就在牛津套房吧。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: I think we're in the Oxford suite then.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我们吃饭的那个房间有大窗户，视野非常好。
content.en_text: The room where we were eating had big windows with really good views.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 你可以看到整个城市。
content.en_text: You could see right across the city.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 就是那里。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: That's it.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 如果您可以独家使用花园，那在六月它将是最佳状态。
content.en_text: If you'd have exclusive access to the garden, it'll be at its best in June.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那么我们可以在那里拍照片。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: So we could have the photos there.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 当然。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Sure.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 事实上，如果您愿意，您甚至可以在那里举行仪式。
content.en_text: In fact, you can even have the ceremony there if you want.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那会是一个美丽的背景。
content.en_text: It makes a lovely background.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 哦，我没想到这一点。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Oh, I hadn't thought of that.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 是的，这确实是个好主意。
content.en_text: Yes, that's certainly an idea.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那有地方跳舞吗？
content.en_text: And is there somewhere for dancing?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Yes.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 餐厅中间有充足的空间。
content.en_text: There's plenty of space in the middle of the dining room.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 哦，是的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Oh, yeah.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我现在想起来了。
content.en_text: I remember now.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那么为了让您有个概念，您想让我告诉您我们的特别婚礼套餐吗？
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: So just to give you an idea, would you like me to tell you about our special wedding

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 套餐吗？
content.en_text: package?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 当然。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Sure.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Right.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那么对于80位客人，您将独家使用牛津套房，就像我说的，然后是
content.en_text: So for 80 guests, you'd have the exclusive use of the Oxford suite, as I said, and then

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 一顿饭。
content.en_text: a meal.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那将是在餐厅里，是一顿包含三道菜的正餐。
content.en_text: So that would be in the dining room and that would be a sit-down meal with three courses.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 房间是怎么布置的？
content.en_text: [Debbie]: And how's the room arranged?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我好像记得你们有圆桌。
content.en_text: I seem to remember you have round tables.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: That's right.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 大多数人喜欢它们胜过长桌。
content.en_text: Most people prefer them to long tables.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 长桌真的不太友好，是吗？
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Long tables aren't really very friendly, are they?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那么桌上的装饰品呢？
content.en_text: And what about decorations on the tables?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 它们包含在套餐内。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: They're included in the package.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们提供白色亚麻桌布和白色椅套。
content.en_text: And we have white linen tablecloths and white chair covers.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们还包含为您特别印刷的个性化设计菜单。
content.en_text: And we also include an individually designed menu specially printed for you.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 这是一份人们可以带走留作纪念的东西。
content.en_text: It's something that people can take away to remember the occasion.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 这是我们今年刚开始做的。
content.en_text: That's something we've just started doing this year.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: All right.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在您听到对话的其余部分之前，您有一些时间查看问题6-10。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at question 6-10.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 然后在晚上快结束的时候，当大家开始精力不足时，
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: And then towards the end of the evening, when everyone's beginning to run out of energy,

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们会提供自助餐，没什么太复杂的，只是一些精选三明治，搭配
content.en_text: we bring in a buffet, nothing too complicated, just a selection of sandwiches together with

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 茶或咖啡。
content.en_text: tea or coffee.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那总是很受欢迎。
content.en_text: That's always very popular.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Right.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我们想要一些音乐。那包含在套餐里吗？
content.en_text: And we want some music. Is that included in the package?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 不。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: No.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 但我们也许可以为您找一个DJ。
content.en_text: But we could probably get you a DJ.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 或者如果我们知道一个非常好的乐队，如果您更喜欢那个的话。
content.en_text: Or we know of a very good band if you'd prefer that.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 是的，那实际上会更好。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Yes, that'd be better, actually.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 能让大家动起来的东西。
content.en_text: Something to get everyone on their feet.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 好的。
content.en_text: Good.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那么除了音乐之外，您说那是一个全包套餐。
content.en_text: So apart from the music, you said that's an all-inclusive package.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 那么那个套餐总共多少钱？
content.en_text: So how much does that package come to?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 5995英镑。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: £5,995.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 这比斯坦利酒店给我的套餐报价贵一点。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: That's a bit more than the package they quoted for me at the Stanley Hotel.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 他们的是4500英镑。
content.en_text: There's was £4,500.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Yes.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 但我想，如果您看看您花这笔钱能得到什么，
content.en_text: But I think if you look at what you're getting for the money,

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 您会发现哪里最物有所值。
content.en_text: you'll find where the best value.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 毕竟这是一件大事。
content.en_text: And it is a big day after all.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 是的，您可能说得对。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Yes, you're probably right.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 哦，我差点忘了。
content.en_text: Oh, and I nearly forgot.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我正在找人能给我做一个非常特别的蛋糕。
content.en_text: I'm looking for someone who can make me a really special cake.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 您能推荐一个吗？
content.en_text: Can you suggest one?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 当然。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Certainly.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们最近开始使用一家新公司。
content.en_text: There's a new company that we've started using.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 他们非常好。
content.en_text: They're very good.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 事实上，我们的婚礼协调员将能为您提供各种建议。
content.en_text: In fact, our wedding coordinator will be able to give you all sorts of advice.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们可以为您提供免费咨询和场地参观。
content.en_text: We can offer you a free consultation and a tour of the venue.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 是的，我肯定会感兴趣的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Yes, well, I'd definitely be interested.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Right.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 嗯，协调员的名字是萨拉·伊萨德。
content.en_text: Well, the coordinator's name is Sarah Izard.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 拼写是 I-Z-A-R-D。
content.en_text: That's I-Z-A-R-D.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那么，您想什么时候见她？
content.en_text: Now, when would you like to meet her?

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 她大部分工作日从上午九点到下午五点有空，
content.en_text: She's available from nine to five most weekdays,

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 或者更晚，如果那更方便的话。
content.en_text: or later, if that's more convenient.

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 我在10月12日上午有空，
content.en_text: [Debbie]: I'm free on the 12th of October in the morning,

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 某个时候，或者10月15日。
content.en_text: sometime, or the 15th of October.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 那样更好，谢谢。
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: That would be better, thanks.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我们定在上午11点半好吗？
content.en_text: Should we say 11.30?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Fine.

content.cn_text: [酒店员工]: 我能记下您的姓名和联系电话吗？
content.en_text: [Hotel Staff]: Can I just take your name and a contact number?

content.cn_text: [黛比]: 当然。我是黛比。
content.en_text: [Debbie]: Sure. It's Debbie.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part one.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 现在您有一分钟时间检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have one minute to check your answers to part one.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1-10.

items.title: a dining room with a good view of the 1. _____
a private garden for 2. _____ and for the wedding ceremony
a late-evening buffet with a choice of 6. _____ and hot drinks
Can also recommend a 8. _____ supplier (new company)

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Wedding arrangements
Available date: 1st June
The Oxford Suite has
• a dining room with a good view of the $1$
• a private garden for $2$ and for the wedding ceremony
• an area suitable for dancing
The wedding package includes
• use of the Oxford Suite
• a three-course meal
• room arranged with $3$ tables
• table $4$ included
• white tablecloths and chairs
• personalized printed $5$
• a late-evening buffet with a choice of $6$ and hot drinks
• Music: hotel will organize a band (not included in price)
Total cost of package:
• £ $7$
• Can also recommend a $8$ supplier (new company)
Wedding coordinator
• Sarah $9$
Date arranged for visit
• $10$ at 11.30 a.m.
